es.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask se integra con servicios de terceros, incluidos GitHub para la autenticacion y la integracion con repositorios, procesadores de pago, incluido Maya Business, para la gestion de transacciones, Cloudflare para el alojamiento y la red de distribucion de contenido, y proveedores de verificacion de identidad para el cumplimiento de Know Your Customer (KYC). Cada servicio de terceros opera conforme a su propia politica de privacidad. Solo compartimos los datos minimos necesarios para que cada integracion funcione. Mantenemos Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) con todos los encargados de tratamiento de terceros segun lo exige el General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) y las leyes aplicables de proteccion de datos.
es.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Si se encuentra en el Reino Unido, sus datos personales estan protegidos conforme al UK GDPR y a la Data Protection Act 2018, cuya aplicacion corresponde a la Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Usted dispone de los mismos derechos que los interesados de la Union Europea indicados anteriormente, adaptados a la legislacion del Reino Unido. PrTask mantiene una base legal para el tratamiento de los datos de los residentes del Reino Unido e implementa medidas tecnicas y organizativas de seguridad adecuadas. Si PrTask no dispone de un establecimiento en el Reino Unido, designaremos un representante en el Reino Unido segun sea necesario. Para ejercer sus derechos o presentar una reclamacion, contacte con nuestro DPO en dpo@prtask.com o con la ICO en ico.org.uk.

fil.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: Nakikipag-integrate ang PrTask sa mga third-party service kabilang ang GitHub para sa authentication at repository integration, mga payment processor kabilang ang Maya Business para sa paghawak ng mga transaksyon, Cloudflare para sa hosting at content delivery network, at mga identity verification provider para sa pagsunod sa Know Your Customer (KYC). Bawat third-party service ay gumagana sa ilalim ng sarili nitong privacy policy. Ang minimum na datos lamang na kailangan para gumana ang bawat integration ang ibinabahagi namin. Nagpapanatili kami ng Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) sa lahat ng third-party processor ayon sa hinihingi ng General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) at ng naaangkop na mga batas sa proteksyon ng datos.
fil.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Kung ikaw ay nasa United Kingdom, ang iyong personal data ay protektado sa ilalim ng UK GDPR at ng Data Protection Act 2018, na ipinapatupad ng Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Mayroon kang kaparehong mga karapatan gaya ng mga data subject sa European Union na nakalista sa itaas, na inangkop sa batas ng United Kingdom. May lawful basis ang PrTask para sa pagproseso ng datos ng mga residente ng United Kingdom at nagpapatupad ito ng naaangkop na teknikal at organisasyonal na mga hakbang sa seguridad. Kung walang establisimyento ang PrTask sa United Kingdom, magtatalaga kami ng kinatawan sa United Kingdom kung kinakailangan. Para gamitin ang iyong mga karapatan o magsampa ng reklamo, makipag-ugnayan sa aming DPO sa dpo@prtask.com o sa ICO sa ico.org.uk.

fr.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask s'integre a des services tiers, notamment GitHub pour l'authentification et l'integration avec les depots, des processeurs de paiement, y compris Maya Business, pour le traitement des transactions, Cloudflare pour l'hebergement et le reseau de diffusion de contenu, ainsi que des fournisseurs de verification d'identite pour la conformite Know Your Customer (KYC). Chaque service tiers fonctionne selon sa propre politique de confidentialite. Nous ne partageons que les donnees minimales necessaires au fonctionnement de chaque integration. Nous maintenons des Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) avec tous les sous-traitants tiers comme l'exigent le General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) et les lois applicables sur la protection des donnees.
fr.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Si vous vous trouvez au Royaume-Uni, vos donnees personnelles sont protegees en vertu du UK GDPR et du Data Protection Act 2018, appliques par l'Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Vous disposez des memes droits que les personnes concernees de l'Union europeenne mentionnes ci-dessus, adaptes au droit britannique. PrTask maintient une base legale pour le traitement des donnees des residents du Royaume-Uni et met en oeuvre des mesures de securite techniques et organisationnelles appropriees. Si PrTask ne dispose pas d'un etablissement au Royaume-Uni, nous designerons un representant au Royaume-Uni si necessaire. Pour exercer vos droits ou deposer une plainte, contactez notre DPO a dpo@prtask.com ou l'ICO sur ico.org.uk.

hi.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask third-party services ke saath integrate karta hai, jinmein authentication aur repository integration ke liye GitHub, transaction handling ke liye payment processors jismein Maya Business shamil hai, hosting aur content delivery network ke liye Cloudflare, aur Know Your Customer (KYC) compliance ke liye identity verification providers shamil hain. Har third-party service apni alag privacy policy ke tahat kaam karti hai. Hum har integration ko chalane ke liye avashyak minimum data hi share karte hain. Hum sabhi third-party processors ke saath Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) maintain karte hain, jaisa ki General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) aur lagu data protection laws ke tahat avashyak hai.
hi.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Yadi aap United Kingdom mein sthit hain, to aapka personal data UK GDPR aur Data Protection Act 2018 ke tahat surakshit hai, jise Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) lagu karta hai. Aapke paas upar suchibaddh European Union data subjects ke saman adhikar hain, jo United Kingdom ke law ke anuroop samayojit kiye gaye hain. PrTask United Kingdom residents ke data processing ke liye lawful basis maintain karta hai aur uchit technical aur organizational security measures lagu karta hai. Yadi PrTask ka United Kingdom mein koi establishment nahin hai, to hum avashyakta anusar ek United Kingdom representative niyukt karenge. Apne adhikaron ka prayog karne ya complaint file karne ke liye hamare DPO se dpo@prtask.com par ya ICO se ico.org.uk par sampark karein.

id.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask terintegrasi dengan layanan pihak ketiga termasuk GitHub untuk autentikasi dan integrasi repositori, pemroses pembayaran termasuk Maya Business untuk penanganan transaksi, Cloudflare untuk hosting dan content delivery network, serta penyedia verifikasi identitas untuk kepatuhan Know Your Customer (KYC). Setiap layanan pihak ketiga beroperasi berdasarkan kebijakan privasinya sendiri. Kami hanya membagikan data minimum yang diperlukan agar setiap integrasi dapat berfungsi. Kami memelihara Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) dengan semua pemroses pihak ketiga sebagaimana diwajibkan oleh General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) dan undang-undang perlindungan data yang berlaku.
id.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Jika Anda berada di United Kingdom, data pribadi Anda dilindungi berdasarkan UK GDPR dan Data Protection Act 2018, yang ditegakkan oleh Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Anda memiliki hak yang sama dengan subjek data Uni Eropa yang tercantum di atas, dengan penyesuaian menurut hukum United Kingdom. PrTask memiliki dasar hukum untuk memproses data penduduk United Kingdom dan menerapkan langkah-langkah keamanan teknis dan organisasi yang tepat. Jika PrTask tidak memiliki pendirian di United Kingdom, kami akan menunjuk perwakilan United Kingdom sebagaimana diwajibkan. Untuk menggunakan hak Anda atau mengajukan pengaduan, hubungi DPO kami di dpo@prtask.com atau ICO di ico.org.uk.

it.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask si integra con servizi di terze parti, tra cui GitHub per l'autenticazione e l'integrazione con i repository, processori di pagamento, incluso Maya Business, per la gestione delle transazioni, Cloudflare per l'hosting e la content delivery network, e fornitori di verifica dell'identita per la conformita Know Your Customer (KYC). Ogni servizio di terze parti opera secondo la propria informativa sulla privacy. Condividiamo solo i dati minimi necessari al funzionamento di ciascuna integrazione. Manteniamo Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) con tutti i responsabili del trattamento di terze parti come richiesto dal General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) e dalle leggi applicabili sulla protezione dei dati.
it.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Se ti trovi nel Regno Unito, i tuoi dati personali sono protetti ai sensi del UK GDPR e del Data Protection Act 2018, applicati dall'Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Hai gli stessi diritti degli interessati dell'Unione europea elencati sopra, adattati al diritto del Regno Unito. PrTask mantiene una base giuridica per il trattamento dei dati dei residenti del Regno Unito e implementa adeguate misure di sicurezza tecniche e organizzative. Se PrTask non dispone di uno stabilimento nel Regno Unito, nomineremo un rappresentante nel Regno Unito come richiesto. Per esercitare i tuoi diritti o presentare un reclamo, contatta il nostro DPO all'indirizzo dpo@prtask.com o l'ICO all'indirizzo ico.org.uk.

ja.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask は、authentication と repository integration のための GitHub、transaction handling のための payment processors（Maya Business を含む）、hosting と content delivery network のための Cloudflare、そして Know Your Customer (KYC) compliance のための identity verification providers などの third-party services と連携しています。各 third-party service はそれぞれ独自の privacy policy の下で運営されています。私たちは各 integration が機能するために必要な最小限の data のみを共有します。PrTask は、General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) および適用される data protection laws に従い、すべての third-party processors と Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) を締結しています。
ja.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: あなたが United Kingdom に所在する場合、あなたの personal data は、Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) により執行される UK GDPR および Data Protection Act 2018 の下で保護されます。あなたには、上記の European Union data subjects と同様の権利があり、それらは United Kingdom law に合わせて適用されます。PrTask は United Kingdom residents の data を処理するための lawful basis を維持し、適切な technical and organizational security measures を実施しています。PrTask が United Kingdom に establishment を有しない場合、必要に応じて United Kingdom representative を任命します。あなたの権利を行使する場合や complaint を提出する場合は、dpo@prtask.com の当社 DPO または ico.org.uk の ICO にご連絡ください。

ko.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask는 authentication 및 repository integration을 위한 GitHub, transaction handling을 위한 payment processors(여기에는 Maya Business가 포함됨), hosting 및 content delivery network를 위한 Cloudflare, 그리고 Know Your Customer (KYC) compliance를 위한 identity verification providers 등 third-party services와 통합됩니다. 각 third-party service는 자체 privacy policy에 따라 운영됩니다. 우리는 각 integration이 작동하는 데 필요한 최소한의 data만 공유합니다. 우리는 General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) 및 적용 가능한 data protection laws가 요구하는 바에 따라 모든 third-party processors와 Data Processing Agreements (DPAs)를 유지합니다.
ko.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: 귀하가 United Kingdom에 있는 경우, 귀하의 personal data는 Information Commissioner's Office (ICO)가 집행하는 UK GDPR 및 Data Protection Act 2018에 따라 보호됩니다. 귀하는 위에 나열된 European Union data subjects와 동일한 권리를 가지며, 이는 United Kingdom law에 맞게 조정됩니다. PrTask는 United Kingdom residents의 data processing을 위한 lawful basis를 유지하고 적절한 technical and organizational security measures를 구현합니다. PrTask가 United Kingdom 내 establishment를 두고 있지 않은 경우, 필요에 따라 United Kingdom representative를 지정합니다. 귀하의 권리를 행사하거나 complaint를 제기하려면 dpo@prtask.com의 당사 DPO 또는 ico.org.uk의 ICO에 문의하십시오.

nl.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask integreert met diensten van derden, waaronder GitHub voor authenticatie en repository-integratie, betalingsverwerkers waaronder Maya Business voor transactieafhandeling, Cloudflare voor hosting en content delivery network, en aanbieders van identiteitsverificatie voor naleving van Know Your Customer (KYC). Elke dienst van derden werkt onder haar eigen privacybeleid. Wij delen alleen de minimale gegevens die nodig zijn om elke integratie te laten functioneren. Wij onderhouden Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) met alle externe verwerkers zoals vereist door de General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) en toepasselijke wetten inzake gegevensbescherming.
nl.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Als u zich in het Verenigd Koninkrijk bevindt, worden uw persoonsgegevens beschermd onder de UK GDPR en de Data Protection Act 2018, gehandhaafd door de Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). U hebt dezelfde rechten als de hierboven vermelde data subjects in de Europese Unie, aangepast aan het recht van het Verenigd Koninkrijk. PrTask beschikt over een rechtsgrond voor de verwerking van gegevens van inwoners van het Verenigd Koninkrijk en implementeert passende technische en organisatorische beveiligingsmaatregelen. Als PrTask geen vestiging in het Verenigd Koninkrijk heeft, zullen wij indien vereist een vertegenwoordiger in het Verenigd Koninkrijk aanwijzen. Om uw rechten uit te oefenen of een klacht in te dienen, kunt u contact opnemen met onze DPO via dpo@prtask.com of met de ICO via ico.org.uk.

pt.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: O PrTask integra-se a servicos de terceiros, incluindo GitHub para autenticacao e integracao com repositorios, processadores de pagamento, incluindo Maya Business, para o tratamento de transacoes, Cloudflare para hospedagem e content delivery network, e provedores de verificacao de identidade para conformidade com Know Your Customer (KYC). Cada servico de terceiro opera de acordo com sua propria privacy policy. Compartilhamos apenas os dados minimos necessarios para que cada integracao funcione. Mantemos Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) com todos os processadores terceirizados, conforme exigido pelo General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) e pelas leis aplicaveis de protecao de dados.
pt.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Se voce estiver localizado no United Kingdom, seus dados pessoais estarao protegidos sob o UK GDPR e o Data Protection Act 2018, aplicados pela Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Voce tem os mesmos direitos dos data subjects da European Union listados acima, adaptados ao direito do United Kingdom. O PrTask mantem uma base legal para processar os dados dos residents do United Kingdom e implementa medidas tecnicas e organizacionais de seguranca apropriadas. Se o PrTask nao tiver um estabelecimento no United Kingdom, nomearemos um representante no United Kingdom conforme exigido. Para exercer seus direitos ou apresentar uma reclamacao, entre em contato com nosso DPO em dpo@prtask.com ou com a ICO em ico.org.uk.

ru.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask интегрируется со сторонними сервисами, включая GitHub для аутентификации и интеграции с репозиториями, платежных провайдеров, включая Maya Business, для обработки транзакций, Cloudflare для хостинга и сети доставки контента, а также поставщиков проверки личности для соблюдения требований Know Your Customer (KYC). Каждый сторонний сервис действует в соответствии со своей собственной privacy policy. Мы передаем только минимальный объем данных, необходимый для работы каждой интеграции. Мы поддерживаем Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) со всеми сторонними processors, как того требуют General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) и применимые законы о защите данных.
ru.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Если вы находитесь в United Kingdom, ваши personal data защищены в соответствии с UK GDPR и Data Protection Act 2018, соблюдение которых обеспечивает Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). У вас есть те же права, что и у data subjects Европейского союза, перечисленных выше, с учетом адаптации к праву United Kingdom. PrTask поддерживает lawful basis для обработки данных residents United Kingdom и применяет соответствующие technical and organizational security measures. Если у PrTask нет establishment в United Kingdom, мы при необходимости назначим представителя в United Kingdom. Чтобы реализовать свои права или подать complaint, свяжитесь с нашим DPO по адресу dpo@prtask.com или с ICO по адресу ico.org.uk.

tr.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask; authentication ve repository integration icin GitHub, transaction handling icin Maya Business dahil payment processors, hosting ve content delivery network icin Cloudflare ve Know Your Customer (KYC) compliance icin identity verification providers dahil olmak uzere third-party services ile entegre olur. Her third-party service kendi privacy policy'si kapsaminda faaliyet gosterir. Her integration'in calismasi icin gerekli olan minimum data'yi paylasiriz. General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) ve uygulanabilir data protection laws tarafindan gerektirilidigi uzere tum third-party processors ile Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) surdururuz.
tr.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: United Kingdom'da bulunuyorsaniz, personal data'niz Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) tarafindan uygulanan UK GDPR ve Data Protection Act 2018 kapsaminda korunur. United Kingdom law'a uyarlanmis olmak uzere, yukarida listelenen European Union data subjects ile ayni haklara sahipsiniz. PrTask, United Kingdom residents'in data processing'i icin lawful basis bulundurur ve uygun technical and organizational security measures uygular. PrTask'in United Kingdom'da bir establishment'i yoksa, gerektiginde bir United Kingdom representative atayacagiz. Haklarinizi kullanmak veya complaint sunmak icin dpo@prtask.com adresindeki DPO'muzla ya da ico.org.uk adresindeki ICO ile iletisime gecin.
